member.name: T:Aspire.Hosting.AzureLogAnalyticsWorkspaceExtensions
member.summary: Provides extension methods for adding the Azure Log Analytics Workspace resources to the application model.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.AzureLogAnalyticsWorkspaceExtensions.AddAzureLogAnalyticsWorkspace(Aspire.Hosting.IDistributedApplicationBuilder,System.String)
member.summary: Adds an Azure Log Analytics Workspace resource to the application model.
member.param: The name of the resource. This name will be used as the connection string name when referenced in a dependency.

member.name: T:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureLogAnalyticsWorkspaceReferenceAnnotation
member.summary: Annotation that indicates a resource is using a specific Log Analytics Workspace.
member.remarks: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureLogAnalyticsWorkspaceReferenceAnnotation.#ctor(Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureLogAnalyticsWorkspaceResource)
member.summary: Annotation that indicates a resource is using a specific Log Analytics Workspace.
member.remarks: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureLogAnalyticsWorkspaceReferenceAnnotation.Workspace
member.summary: Gets the Log Analytics Workspace resource.

member.name: T:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureLogAnalyticsWorkspaceResource
member.summary: A resource that represents an Azure Log Analytics Workspace resource.
member.param: Callback to configure the Azure Log Analytics Workspace resource.

member.name: M:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureLogAnalyticsWorkspaceResource.#ctor(System.String,System.Action{Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureResourceInfrastructure})
member.summary: A resource that represents an Azure Log Analytics Workspace resource.
member.param: Callback to configure the Azure Log Analytics Workspace resource.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureLogAnalyticsWorkspaceResource.NameOutputReference
member.summary: Gets the "name" output reference for the resource.

member.name: P:Aspire.Hosting.Azure.AzureLogAnalyticsWorkspaceResource.WorkspaceId
member.summary: Gets the "logAnalyticsWorkspaceId" output reference for the Azure Log Analytics Workspace resource.
